description: A manager needs to approve a vacation request submitted by one of their direct reports.

nodes.task_description: Access the pending time-off requests in the HRIS manager self-service portal.

expected_outcome.value: Manager successfully navigates to the approval queue.

nodes.task_description: Review the employee's request and check the team calendar for potential conflicts.

expected_outcome.value: Manager sees no conflicts with other team members' time off.

nodes.task_description: Approve the time-off request in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Manager clicks 'Approve', which notifies the employee and updates their leave balance.
